void-black.$description: Void Black — Page canvas, hero field, all large surface areas — the dominant ground that makes every other element read as signal

bone-white.$description: Bone White — Primary body text, paragraph copy, bio blocks, nav labels — slightly off-white so it never feels clinical against the pure black field

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Headline text, hero display type, the loudest typographic register — pure white reserved for the largest voices on the page

ash.$description: Ash — Secondary heading text, muted labels, supportive metadata — the middle gray that lets a subhead recede behind a headline

iron-gray.$description: Iron Gray — Subtle hairline dividers and section separators — barely one step off the canvas, used only when a line needs to exist without announcing itself

graphite.$description: Graphite — Dark borders and separators for elevated surfaces and inverted UI. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

signal-lime.$description: Signal Lime — Signature accent: the oversized hero disc, focal point punctuation, and any single high-attention graphic — a single neon-lime shape per screen, never decorative repetition

cobalt-bar.$description: Cobalt Bar — Active header band and focus state for the top navigation — replaces the black header on scroll/hover to mark the system is now engaged

neue-haas-grotesk.$description: The only voice on the site. Used for hero display (71px), section headlines (31px), subheads (23–26px), and body copy (18–19px). The signature is a single weight — 400 only — across every size; bold is never used. This monoweight discipline is the typographic equivalent of the black canvas: everything that would normally shout is forced to speak at the same volume, and the hierarchy comes purely from scale and line-height, never from weight contrast.

times.$description: Secondary fine-print and small image captions. The serif appears only at 13px, creating an editorial footnote register that contrasts the grotesque's modern authority with a quiet traditionalist voice.

void.$description: Surface level 0: Full-bleed page canvas — the entire site lives on this single surface

cobalt-band.$description: Surface level 1: Active header strip that replaces the black bar when navigation is engaged
